ruleBookInfo.tocUrl:
<js>
var booktxt_index = baseUrl.lastIndexOf("\/");
booktxt_str = baseUrl.substring(booktxt_index + 1, baseUrl.length);
booktxt_str1 = booktxt_str.substring(0, booktxt_str.length-3);
if (booktxt_str1=="") booktxt_str1="0";
'https://www.booktxt.net/'+booktxt_str1+'_'+booktxt_str+'/'
</js>
